description: Defines a union type where all fields share the same memory location, meaning its size is equal to its largest member. Unions are essential for memory-efficient structs that only hold one state at a time.
features: Automatic transparent field resolution on assignment (e.g., `my_union = c"hello"` automatically resolves to `my_union.str_field = c"hello"` if types match).
constraints: Cannot be assigned to types that are not present in the union.
